$comment: Top tech + AI/ML employers that sponsor H-1B, EXCLUDING Amazon (plan §1, design §2.2). Tagged by connector tier; handles live-verified at build time (2026-06-21). clean_ats handles are confirmed against the public Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby JSON APIs. Workday + custom_site are sourcing-only (apply deferred). Hugging Face uses Workable (no v1 connector) so it is disabled.

companies.name: Scale AI
companies.notes: On Greenhouse, not Lever/Ashby (corrected at build time).

companies.name: Cohere
companies.notes: On Ashby, not Lever (corrected at build time).

companies.name: Hugging Face
companies.notes: Uses Workable (apply.workable.com/huggingface); no v1 connector. Source via Adzuna instead.

companies.name: Together AI
companies.notes: On Greenhouse, not Ashby (corrected at build time).

companies.notes: On Ashby (handle 'Notion'), not Greenhouse (corrected at build time).

companies.notes: Workday apply deferred to Phase 4b; sourcing only.

companies.notes: Workday apply deferred to Phase 4b; sourcing only.
